creator: cheunghonyu@gmail.com
text:
textproc/gtk-doc fails to build at configure stage of poudriere. It is searching for DocBook XML DTD V4.3 but textproc/docbook-xml-430 is not a dependence of this port.

my poudreiere error log as following:
http://pastebin.com/N71FA7V8

Fix: Apply the patch to adding textproc/docbook-xml-430 as build dependence.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: build gtk-doc by poudriere
